channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The overlooked organ that may predict lifespan
item.description: A long-ignored organ could offer surprising insights into healthy aging and cancer survival. Researchers at Mass General Brigham used AI to analyze CT scans...

item.title: Hubble captures M88 on a perilous journey that may transform it
item.description: The spiral galaxy Messier 88 is speeding through the crowded Virgo Cluster on a path that will dramatically alter its future. At its...

item.title: Your kitchen sponge sheds microplastics with each dishwashing session
item.description: Kitchen sponges release microplastics as they degrade during routine use, with some types shedding significantly more than others. Researchers estimate that...

item.title: NASA's Roman telescope could detect 100,000 hidden exoplanets
item.description: NASA's Roman Space Telescope may transform the search for alien worlds by discovering about 100,000 exoplanets—far more than all previous missions combined.
